title: ExecutionReport
description: Final report produced after a mock or real experiment run.

schema_version.description: Schema version of the execution report format

resolved_recipe_id.description: Identifier of the resolved recipe executed

safety_report_id.description: Identifier of the safety report used

steps_total.description: Total number of steps in the resolved recipe

events_written.description: Number of events written to events.jsonl

raw_frames_written.description: Number of raw frames written to rawbin

run_directory.description: Absolute or relative path to the run directory
